---
title: "The Rev. James Gavin Young"
---

## The Rev. James Gavin Young

**Dates:** (India 1818/9-1906)

### Description

Vicar of Hursley

### Biography

CMY calls him Jimmy Young. Brother of the Rev. Peter Young, he succeeded Keble as Vicar of Hursley, 1866; he had a wife Anna (b. Ilfracombe 1824/5), and children Frances (b. Brigstock Northants 1850/1), Elspeth Jane (b. 1853/4), Harry Gavin (b. Scotland 1854/5), Anna Edith (b.  1856/7), Louisa Caroline (b. 1858/9) and Marion Jemima (b. 1859/60). [1861, 81 census, <i>Recollections of the Rev. Peter Young</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from [dated by Coleridge after 1893]
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from December 30 [1871]
- Letter from October 5, 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
